name: UBA : User Access from Multiple Hosts
notes: Detects when a single user logs in from more than an allowed number of devices. By default the rule is configured to allow up to different ip connections. Edit this rule to change the number of allowed connections.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 3 times with the same Username and different Source IP in 2 minutes
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 3 times with the same Username and different Source IP in 2 minutes
thresholds: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 3 times with the same Username and different Source IP in 2 minutes
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Access from Multiple Hosts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 3 times with the same Username and different Source IP in 2 minutes
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Access from Multiple Hosts
